name: Aloha Surf Board
description: The ultimate shortboard for catching summer waves. Lightweight epoxy construction with a vibrant tropical design. Great for intermediate and advanced surfers who want speed and control.

name: UV Shield Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Reef-safe broad spectrum sunscreen. Water-resistant for 80 minutes. Protects against UVA and UVB rays. Lightweight, non-greasy formula that absorbs quickly into skin.

name: Tropical Hammock Set
description: Premium nylon hammock with colorful tropical pattern. Easy setup between any two trees. Holds up to 400 lbs. Comes with hanging hardware, straps, and a carry pouch.

name: Polarized Beach Sunglasses
description: 100% UV400 polarized lenses. Lightweight TR90 frame, perfect for beach, boating, fishing, and outdoor adventures. Reduces glare on water for crystal-clear vision all day.

name: Inflatable Beach Float
description: Giant inflatable flamingo pool float. Made from premium heavy-duty PVC, fits adults comfortably. Vibrant color stays bright all season. Includes repair kit.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Extra-large waterproof tote bag with multiple compartments. Sand-free, quick-dry material. Built-in cooler pocket keeps drinks cold. Fits towels, sunscreen, shoes, and more.

name: Snorkel Dive Set
description: Full snorkel set with tempered glass mask, dry-top snorkel, and adjustable fins. Anti-fog lens coating for crystal-clear underwater views. Perfect for reef exploration.

name: Portable Beach Umbrella
description: UPF 50+ sun protection beach umbrella. Wind-resistant design with reinforced ribs. Easy push-button tilt mechanism. Sets up in seconds with the sand anchor included.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothing 99% pure aloe vera gel with added vitamin E and cucumber extract. Instantly cools sunburned skin, reduces redness, and promotes healing. No parabens or artificial fragrance.

name: Waterproof Bluetooth Speaker
description: IPX7 fully waterproof speaker with 360-degree sound. 20-hour battery life, floats on water, and connects via Bluetooth 5.0. Built-in microphone for hands-free calls. Carabiner clip included.

name: Lightweight Rashguard Top
description: UPF 50+ sun protection rashguard. 4-way stretch recycled polyester fabric dries in minutes. Flatlock seams prevent chafing. Perfect for surfing, kayaking, and all water activities.

name: Folding Beach Chair
description: Ultra-lightweight aluminum folding beach chair with cup holder, phone pocket, and adjustable backrest. Supports up to 300 lbs. Folds into a compact carry bag for easy transport.

name: Paddleboard & Kayak Hybrid
description: Inflatable 2-in-1 paddleboard and kayak. Convert in seconds by attaching the kayak seat. Includes paddle, pump, leash, and backpack. Stable design for lakes, rivers, and calm bays.

name: Insulated Cooler Backpack
description: 30-can capacity insulated cooler backpack. Keeps ice for up to 24 hours. Leakproof liner, padded shoulder straps, and multiple exterior pockets. Hands-free convenience for any day out.

name: Kids Swim Vest
description: USCG-approved swim vest for kids 30-50 lbs. Bright neon colors for high visibility. Dual zipper with safety clip. Soft neoprene lining is gentle on skin. Makes learning to swim safe and fun.

name: Floral Print Sarong Wrap
description: Lightweight 100% rayon sarong with vivid tropical floral print. Can be worn as a beach cover-up, skirt, dress, or scarf. Hand wash and machine dry. One size fits most.

name: Tinted Mineral Sunscreen SPF 30
description: Mineral zinc oxide formula with light tint that works on all skin tones. Buildable coverage with a moisturizing finish. Reef-safe and 100% free of chemical filters. Hyaluronic acid included.

name: Sandproof Beach Blanket
description: Extra-large 9x10 ft sandproof beach blanket made from parachute nylon. Sand falls right through. Dries instantly, packs into a tiny pouch. Stakes and corner pockets keep it secure in wind.

name: Tropical Scented Candle Set
description: Set of 3 hand-poured soy wax candles in coconut, mango, and hibiscus scents. 40-hour burn time each. Recyclable glass jars make perfect decor. Bring the beach indoors all summer long.

name: Mesh Dive Fins
description: Full-foot open-heel dive fins with channeled blade for maximum propulsion. Thermoplastic rubber foot pocket for a comfortable fit. Lightweight and easy to pack in a dive bag.

name: UV Lip Balm SPF 30 Pack
description: Pack of 4 moisturizing lip balms with SPF 30 protection. Flavors: coconut, watermelon, mango, and vanilla. Sheer tint available. Water-resistant and long-lasting hydration for summer days.

name: Rattan Beach Hat
description: Wide-brim woven rattan sun hat with adjustable interior band. UPF 40+ rated. Crushable and packable — perfect for travel. Pairs with any swimwear or summer dress.

name: Outdoor String Lights
description: 48 ft waterproof LED string lights with Edison-style bulbs. Perfect for patios, pergolas, and beach nights. Energy-efficient, dimmable, and safe for outdoor use all summer.

name: Waterproof Action Camera
description: 4K waterproof action camera rated to 30m depth. Wide-angle lens, image stabilization, and built-in Wi-Fi for instant phone sharing. Includes mounting accessories and two batteries.

name: Portable Pop-Up Beach Tent
description: Easy 30-second pop-up beach tent. UPF 50+ protection. Fits 3 adults, has a ventilation window and sandbag anchors. Folds into a flat disc carry bag. Windproof up to 25 mph.

name: Kids Beach Toy Set
description: 18-piece beach sand toy set for kids. Includes buckets, shovels, molds, rakes, and watering can. BPA-free, non-toxic plastic. Bright colors and durable construction for hours of play.

name: Neoprene Wetsuit 3mm
description: 3mm full-length neoprene wetsuit for surfing, diving, and paddleboarding. Flatlock stitching for comfort, YKK back zipper, and reinforced knee pads. Available in sizes XS-3XL.

name: Sunset Gradient Bikini Set
description: Vibrant orange-to-coral gradient bikini set. Adjustable triangle top and full-coverage bottoms. Quick-dry Lycra fabric, chlorine-resistant. Available in XS-XL. Flattering for all body types.

name: Bamboo Picnic Set
description: Eco-friendly bamboo picnic set for 4 people. Includes plates, cups, cutlery, and a reusable carry bag. Lightweight, compostable, and dishwasher safe. Perfect for beach and park outings.

name: Hydration Running Vest
description: Lightweight 10L running vest with 2L hydration bladder. Breathable mesh panels, bounce-free fit, and 6 storage pockets. Reflective strips for early morning and evening runs.

name: Surf Wax & Traction Pack
description: 6-pack combo of tropical-scented surf wax (cool, warm, and tropical temps) plus a full-deck non-slip traction pad. Works on all board types. Grip that lasts all session long.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 32oz
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours, hot for 12. Leak-proof lid, wide-mouth opening for ice cubes. Available in 6 tropical colors.
